site.title: KGParl Parliamentary Group Minutes
site.subtitle: Commission for History of Parliamentarism and Political Parties
site.description: Historical-digital source edition of the minutes of parliamentary groups in the German Bundestag 1949–2005

search.label: Full-text search
search.title: Full-text Search
search.description: Search the minutes and introductions of the edition
search.fulltext: Full-text search across minutes and introductions
search.syntaxNotDesc: Excludes results containing the second term
search.syntaxMinusDesc: Shorthand for NOT (no space before the term)
search.syntaxPhraseDesc: Searches for the exact word sequence
search.syntaxCombinedDesc: Combined search: phrase without certain terms
search.firstHitNote: Due to system constraints, only the first occurrence is displayed for each document. The searched word may occur elsewhere in the document.
search.letterHintText: The letter navigation and text search are mutually exclusive. Entering a search term resets any active letter filter and vice versa.

protocols.title: Minutes
protocols.description: Browse the digitized parliamentary group minutes of the German Bundestag

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.calendarExplanation: This calendar lists all available minutes of parliamentary group meetings in the German Bundestag by their dates. The color coding allows you to see at a glance which parliamentary groups met on a specific day.
calendar.multipleSessions: Multiple sessions on the same day are visualized by multiple colors on the corresponding calendar day.
calendar.yearInputHint: Click on the year to enter a specific year directly.
calendar.directAccess: The calendar provides direct access to the edited session minutes:
calendar.hoverEffect: Session Agenda (Hover): When you move the cursor over a colored day, a list of sessions held on that day with their agenda items is displayed.
calendar.clickEffect: Minutes View (Click): By clicking on one of the listed agenda items, you go directly to the corresponding view of the edited minutes.

introductions.description: Scholarly introductions to the edition volumes of the parliamentary group minutes

index.heroTitleLine1: Parliamentary Groups in the German Bundestag.

index.protocolsDescSuffix: minutes from parliamentary group meetings of the German Bundestag from 1949 to 2005.
index.protocolsLink: To the list view of minutes
index.personRegisterDescSuffix: entries. It covers parliamentary group members and other individuals from the parliamentary-political sphere to contextualize their roles and activities.

index.introductionsDesc: Each print volume of the edition contains a scholarly introduction, made available here in digital form, explaining the historical context and the state of research.
